I've uploaded a python code repository in the directory /testbed. Consider the following PR description:

<pr_description>
Reflection: have some indication of property hooks in `_property_string()`
### Description

The following code (https://3v4l.org/1fUfI)

```php
<?php

interface IHookedDemo {
    public mixed $prop1 { get; }
    public mixed $prop2 { set; }
    public mixed $prop3 { get; set; }
}
abstract class HookedDemo {
    abstract public mixed $prop1 { get; }
    abstract public mixed $prop2 { set; }
    abstract public mixed $prop3 { get; set; }
}
class WithHooks {
    public mixed $prop1 {
        get => "always this string";
    }
    public mixed $prop2 {
        set => strtolower($value);
    }
    public mixed $prop3 {
        get => $this->prop3;
        set => strtolower($value);
    }
}
class WithFinalHooks {
    public mixed $prop1 {
        final get => "always this string";
    }
    public mixed $prop2 {
        final set => strtolower($value);
    }
    public mixed $prop3 {
        final get => $this->prop3;
        final set => strtolower($value);
    }
}
$classes = [
    IHookedDemo::class,
    HookedDemo::class,
    WithHooks::class,
    WithFinalHooks::class,
];
foreach ( $classes as $clazz ) {
    echo "$clazz:\n";
    $ref = new ReflectionClass( $clazz );
    echo $ref;
    foreach ( [ 'prop1', 'prop2', 'prop3' ] as $prop ) {
        $propRef = new ReflectionProperty( $clazz, $prop );
        echo $propRef;
    }
    echo "\n";
}
```

Resulted in this output:
```
IHookedDemo:
```

    69	static zend_always_inline zval *reflection_prop_name(zval *object) {
    70	        /* $name is always in the first property slot. */
    71	        ZEND_ASSERT(Z_OBJCE_P(object)->default_properties_count >= 1);
    72	        return &Z_OBJ_P(object)->properties_table[0];
    73	}

    76	        /* $class is always in the second property slot. */
    77	        ZEND_ASSERT(Z_OBJCE_P(object)->default_properties_count >= 2);
    78	        return &Z_OBJ_P(object)->properties_table[1];
    79	}

  2002	{
  2003	        reflection_object *intern;
  2004	        zend_function *fptr;
  2005	
  2006	        ZEND_PARSE_PARAMETERS_NONE();
  2007	        GET_REFLECTION_OBJECT_PTR(fptr);
  2008	        if (fptr->type == ZEND_USER_FUNCTION) {
  2009	                RETURN_LONG(fptr->op_array.line_end);

  2039	{

  2058	/* {{{ Returns an associative array containing this function's static variables and their values */
  2059	ZEND_METHOD(ReflectionFunctionAbstract, getStaticVariables)
  2060	{
  2061	        reflection_object *intern;
  2062	        zend_function *fptr;
  2063	
  2064	        ZEND_PARSE_PARAMETERS_NONE();
  2065	        GET_REFLECTION_OBJECT_PTR(fptr);
  2066	
  2067	        /* Return an empty array in case no static variables exist */
  2068	        if (fptr->type == ZEND_USER_FUNCTION && fptr->op_array.static_variables != NULL) {
  2069	                HashTable *ht;
  2070	
  2071	                array_init(return_value);
  2072	                ht = ZEND_MAP_PTR_GET(fptr->op_array.static_variables_ptr);
  2073	                if (!ht) {
  2074	                        ht = zend_array_dup(fptr->op_array.static_variables);
  2075	                        ZEND_MAP_PTR_SET(fptr->op_array.static_variables_ptr, ht);
  2076	                }
  2077	                zend_hash_copy(Z_ARRVAL_P(return_value), ht, zval_add_ref);
  2078	        } else {
  2079	                RETURN_EMPTY_ARRAY();
  2080	        }
  2081	}

  2084	/* {{{ Invokes the function */
  2085	ZEND_METHOD(ReflectionFunction, invoke)
  2086	{
  2087	        zval retval;
  2088	        zval *params;
  2089	        uint32_t num_args;
  2090	        HashTable *named_params;
  2091	        zend_fcall_info_cache fcc;
  2092	        reflection_object *intern;
  2093	        zend_function *fptr;
  2094	
  2095	        ZEND_PARSE_PARAMETERS_START(0, -1)
  2096	                Z_PARAM_VARIADIC_WITH_NAMED(params, num_args, named_params)
  2097	        ZEND_PARSE_PARAMETERS_END();
  2098	
  2099	        GET_REFLECTION_OBJECT_PTR(fptr);
  2100	
  2101	        fcc.function_handler = fptr;
  2102	        fcc.called_scope = NULL;
  2103	        fcc.object = NULL;
  2104	
  2105	        if (!Z_ISUNDEF(intern->obj)) {
  2106	                Z_OBJ_HT(intern->obj)->get_closure(
  2107	                        Z_OBJ(intern->obj), &fcc.called_scope, &fcc.function_handler, &fcc.object, 0);
  2108	        }
  2109	
  2110	        zend_call_known_fcc(&fcc, &retval, num_args, params, named_params);
  2111	
  2112	        if (Z_TYPE(retval) == IS_UNDEF && !EG(exception)) {
  2113	                zend_throw_exception_ex(reflection_exception_ptr, 0,
  2114	                        "Invocation of function %s() failed", ZSTR_VAL(fptr->common.function_name));
  2115	                RETURN_THROWS();
  2116	        }
  2117	
  2118	        if (Z_ISREF(retval)) {
  2119	                zend_unwrap_reference(&retval);
  2120	        }
  2121	        ZVAL_COPY_VALUE(return_value, &retval);
  2122	}
  2123	/* }}} */
  2124	
  2125	/* {{{ Invokes the function and pass its arguments as array. */
  2126	ZEND_METHOD(ReflectionFunction, invokeArgs)
  2127	{
  2128	        zval retval;
  2129	        zend_fcall_info_cache fcc;
  2130	        reflection_object *intern;
  2131	        zend_function *fptr;
  2132	        HashTable *params;
  2133	
  2134	        if (zend_parse_parameters(ZEND_NUM_ARGS(), "h", &params) == FAILURE) {
  2135	                RETURN_THROWS();
  2136	        }
  2137	
  2138	        GET_REFLECTION_OBJECT_PTR(fptr);
  2139	
  2140	        fcc.function_handler = fptr;
  2141	        fcc.called_scope = NULL;
  2142	        fcc.object = NULL;
  2143	
  2144	        if (!Z_ISUNDEF(intern->obj)) {
  2145	                Z_OBJ_HT(intern->obj)->get_closure(
  2146	                        Z_OBJ(intern->obj), &fcc.called_scope, &fcc.function_handler, &fcc.object, 0);
  2147	        }
  2148	
  2149	        zend_call_known_fcc(&fcc, &retval, /* num_params */ 0, /* params */ NULL, params);
  2150	
  2151	        if (Z_TYPE(retval) == IS_UNDEF && !EG(exception)) {
  2152	                zend_throw_exception_ex(reflection_exception_ptr, 0,
  2153	                        "Invocation of function %s() failed", ZSTR_VAL(fptr->common.function_name));
  2154	                RETURN_THROWS();
  2155	        }
  2156	
  2157	        if (Z_ISREF(retval)) {
  2158	                zend_unwrap_reference(&retval);
  2159	        }
  2160	        ZVAL_COPY_VALUE(return_value, &retval);

  2178	/* {{{ Gets the number of parameters */
  2179	ZEND_METHOD(ReflectionFunctionAbstract, getNumberOfParameters)
  2180	{
  2181	        reflection_object *intern;
  2182	        zend_function *fptr;
  2183	        uint32_t num_args;
  2184	
  2185	        ZEND_PARSE_PARAMETERS_NONE();
  2186	
  2187	        GET_REFLECTION_OBJECT_PTR(fptr);
  2188	
  2189	        num_args = fptr->common.num_args;
  2190	        if (fptr->common.fn_flags & ZEND_ACC_VARIADIC) {
  2191	                num_args++;
  2192	        }
  2193	
  2194	        RETURN_LONG(num_args);
  2195	}
  2196	/* }}} */
  2197	
  2198	/* {{{ Gets the number of required parameters */
  2199	ZEND_METHOD(ReflectionFunctionAbstract, getNumberOfRequiredParameters)
  2200	{
  2201	        reflection_object *intern;
  2202	        zend_function *fptr;
  2203	
  2204	        ZEND_PARSE_PARAMETERS_NONE();
  2205	
  2206	        GET_REFLECTION_OBJECT_PTR(fptr);
  2207	
  2208	        RETURN_LONG(fptr->common.required_num_args);
  2209	}
  2210	/* }}} */
  2211	
  2212	/* {{{ Returns an array of parameter objects for this function */
  2213	ZEND_METHOD(ReflectionFunctionAbstract, getParameters)
  2214	{
  2215	        reflection_object *intern;
  2216	        zend_function *fptr;
  2217	        uint32_t i, num_args;
  2218	        struct _zend_arg_info *arg_info;
  2219	
  2220	        ZEND_PARSE_PARAMETERS_NONE();
  2221	
  2222	        GET_REFLECTION_OBJECT_PTR(fptr);
  2223	
  2224	        arg_info= fptr->common.arg_info;
  2225	        num_args = fptr->common.num_args;
  2226	        if (fptr->common.fn_flags & ZEND_ACC_VARIADIC) {
  2227	                num_args++;
  2228	        }
  2229	
  2230	        if (!num_args) {
  2231	                RETURN_EMPTY_ARRAY();
  2232	        }
  2233	
  2234	        array_init(return_value);
  2235	        for (i = 0; i < num_args; i++) {
  2236	                zval parameter;
  2237	
  2238	                reflection_parameter_factory(
  2239	                        _copy_function(fptr),
  2240	                        Z_ISUNDEF(intern->obj) ? NULL : &intern->obj,
  2241	                        arg_info,
  2242	                        i,
  2243	                        i < fptr->common.required_num_args,
  2244	                        &parameter
  2245	                );
  2246	                zend_hash_next_index_insert_new(Z_ARRVAL_P(return_value), &parameter);
  2247	
  2248	                arg_info++;
  2249	        }
  2250	}
  2251	/* }}} */
  2252	
  2253	/* {{{ Returns NULL or the extension the function belongs to */
  2254	ZEND_METHOD(ReflectionFunctionAbstract, getExtension)
  2255	{
  2256	        reflection_object *intern;
  2257	        zend_function *fptr;
  2258	        zend_internal_function *internal;
  2259	
  2260	        ZEND_PARSE_PARAMETERS_NONE();
  2261	
  2262	        GET_REFLECTION_OBJECT_PTR(fptr);
  2263	
  2264	        if (fptr->type != ZEND_INTERNAL_FUNCTION) {
  2265	                RETURN_NULL();
  2266	        }
  2267	
  2268	        internal = (zend_internal_function *)fptr;
  2269	        if (internal->module) {
  2270	                reflection_extension_factory(return_value, internal->module->name);
  2271	        } else {
  2272	                RETURN_NULL();
  2273	        }
  2274	}
  2275	/* }}} */
  2276	
  2277	/* {{{ Returns false or the name of the extension the function belongs to */
  2278	ZEND_METHOD(ReflectionFunctionAbstract, getExtensionName)
  2279	{
  2280	        reflection_object *intern;
  2281	        zend_function *fptr;
  2282	        zend_internal_function *internal;
  2283	
  2284	        ZEND_PARSE_PARAMETERS_NONE();
  2285	
  2286	        GET_REFLECTION_OBJECT_PTR(fptr);
  2287	
  2288	        if (fptr->type != ZEND_INTERNAL_FUNCTION) {
  2289	                RETURN_FALSE;
  2290	        }
  2291	
  2292	        internal = (zend_internal_function *)fptr;
  2293	        if (internal->module) {
  2294	                RETURN_STRING(internal->module->name);
  2295	        } else {
  2296	                RETURN_FALSE;
  2297	        }
  2298	}
  2299	/* }}} */
  2300	
  2301	/* {{{ */
  2302	ZEND_METHOD(ReflectionGenerator, __construct)
  2303	{
  2304	        zval *generator, *object;
  2305	        reflection_object *intern;
  2306	
  2307	        object = ZEND_THIS;
  2308	        intern = Z_REFLECTION_P(object);
  2309	
  2310	        if (zend_parse_parameters(ZEND_NUM_ARGS(), "O", &generator, zend_ce_generator) == FAILURE) {

  2319	        ZVAL_OBJ_COPY(&intern->obj, Z_OBJ_P(generator));
  2320	        intern->ce = zend_ce_generator;
  2321	}
  2322	/* }}} */
  2323	
  2324	#define REFLECTION_CHECK_VALID_GENERATOR(ex) \
  2325	        if (!ex) { \
  2326	                _DO_THROW("Cannot fetch information from a closed Generator"); \
  2327	                RETURN_THROWS(); \
  2328	        }
  2329	
  2330	/* {{{ */
  2331	ZEND_METHOD(ReflectionGenerator, getTrace)
  2332	{
  2333	        zend_long options = DEBUG_BACKTRACE_PROVIDE_OBJECT;
  2334	        zend_generator *generator = (zend_generator *) Z_OBJ(Z_REFLECTION_P(ZEND_THIS)->obj);
  2335	        zend_generator *root_generator;
  2336	        zend_execute_data *ex_backup = EG(current_execute_data);
  2337	        zend_execute_data *ex = generator->execute_data;
  2338	        zend_execute_data *root_prev = NULL, *cur_prev;
  2339	
  2340	        if (zend_parse_parameters(ZEND_NUM_ARGS(), "|l", &options) == FAILURE) {
  2341	                RETURN_THROWS();
  2342	        }
  2343	
  2344	        REFLECTION_CHECK_VALID_GENERATOR(ex)
  2345	
  2346	        root_generator = zend_generator_get_current(generator);
  2347	
  2348	        cur_prev = generator->execute_data->prev_execute_data;
  2349	        if (generator == root_generator) {
  2350	                generator->execute_data->prev_execute_data = NULL;
  2351	        } else {
  2352	                root_prev = root_generator->execute_data->prev_execute_data;
  2353	                generator->execute_fake.prev_execute_data = NULL;
  2354	                root_generator->execute_data->prev_execute_data = &generator->execute_fake;
  2355	        }
  2356	
  2357	        EG(current_execute_data) = root_generator->execute_data;
  2358	        zend_fetch_debug_backtrace(return_value, 0, options, 0);
  2359	        EG(current_execute_data) = ex_backup;
  2360	
  2361	        root_generator->execute_data->prev_execute_data = root_prev;
  2362	        generator->execute_data->prev_execute_data = cur_prev;
  2363	}
  2364	/* }}} */
  2365	
  2366	/* {{{ */
  2367	ZEND_METHOD(ReflectionGenerator, getExecutingLine)

  2395	ZEND_METHOD(ReflectionGenerator, getFunction)
  2396	{
  2397	        zend_generator *generator = (zend_generator *) Z_OBJ(Z_REFLECTION_P(ZEND_THIS)->obj);
  2398	        zend_function *func = generator->func;
  2399	
  2400	        ZEND_PARSE_PARAMETERS_NONE();
  2401	
  2402	        if (func->common.fn_flags & ZEND_ACC_CLOSURE) {
  2403	                zval closure;
  2404	                ZVAL_OBJ(&closure, ZEND_CLOSURE_OBJECT(func));
  2405	                reflection_function_factory(func, &closure, return_value);
  2406	        } else if (func->op_array.scope) {
  2407	                reflection_method_factory(func->op_array.scope, func, NULL, return_value);
  2408	        } else {
  2409	                reflection_function_factory(func, NULL, return_value);
  2410	        }
  2411	}

  3076	/* For BC with iterable for named types */
  3077	static zend_string *zend_named_reflection_type_to_string(zend_type type) {
  3078	        if (ZEND_TYPE_IS_ITERABLE_FALLBACK(type)) {
  3079	                zend_string *iterable = ZSTR_KNOWN(ZEND_STR_ITERABLE);
  3080	                if (ZEND_TYPE_FULL_MASK(type) & MAY_BE_NULL) {
  3081	                        return zend_string_concat2("?", strlen("?"), ZSTR_VAL(iterable), ZSTR_LEN(iterable));
  3082	                }
  3083	                return iterable;
  3084	        }
  3085	        return zend_type_to_string(type);
  3086	}
  3087

  3089	        ZEND_TYPE_FULL_MASK(type) &= ~MAY_BE_NULL;
  3090	        return zend_named_reflection_type_to_string(type);
  3091	}

  3141	static void append_type(zval *return_value, zend_type type) {
  3142	        zval reflection_type;
  3143	        /* Drop iterable BC bit for type list */
  3144	        if (ZEND_TYPE_IS_ITERABLE_FALLBACK(type)) {
  3145	                ZEND_TYPE_FULL_MASK(type) &= ~_ZEND_TYPE_ITERABLE_BIT;
  3146	        }
  3147	
  3148	        reflection_type_factory(type, &reflection_type, 0);
  3149	        zend_hash_next_index_insert(Z_ARRVAL_P(return_value), &reflection_type);
  3150	}
  3151	
  3152	static void append_type_mask(zval *return_value, uint32_t type_mask) {
  3153	        append_type(return_value, (zend_type) ZEND_TYPE_INIT_MASK(type_mask));
  3154	}
  3155	
  3156	/* {{{ Returns the types that are part of this union type */
  3157	ZEND_METHOD(ReflectionUnionType, getTypes)
  3158	{
  3159	        reflection_object *intern;
  3160	        type_reference *param;
  3161	        uint32_t type_mask;
  3162	
  3163	        ZEND_PARSE_PARAMETERS_NONE();
  3164	        GET_REFLECTION_OBJECT_PTR(param);
  3165	
  3166	        array_init(return_value);
  3167	        if (ZEND_TYPE_HAS_LIST(param->type)) {
  3168	                const zend_type *list_type;
  3169	                ZEND_TYPE_LIST_FOREACH(ZEND_TYPE_LIST(param->type), list_type) {
  3170	                        append_type(return_value, *list_type);
  3171	                } ZEND_TYPE_LIST_FOREACH_END();
  3172	        } else if (ZEND_TYPE_HAS_NAME(param->type)) {
  3173	                zend_string *name = ZEND_TYPE_NAME(param->type);
  3174	                append_type(return_value, (zend_type) ZEND_TYPE_INIT_CLASS(name, 0, 0));
  3175	        }
  3176	
  3177	        type_mask = ZEND_TYPE_PURE_MASK(param->type);
  3178	        ZEND_ASSERT(!(type_mask & MAY_BE_VOID));
  3179	        ZEND_ASSERT(!(type_mask & MAY_BE_NEVER));
  3180	        if (type_mask & MAY_BE_STATIC) {
  3181	                append_type_mask(return_value, MAY_BE_STATIC);
  3182	        }
  3183	        if (type_mask & MAY_BE_CALLABLE) {
  3184	                append_type_mask(return_value, MAY_BE_CALLABLE);
  3185	        }
  3186	        if (type_mask & MAY_BE_OBJECT) {
  3187	                append_type_mask(return_value, MAY_BE_OBJECT);
  3188	        }
  3189	        if (type_mask & MAY_BE_ARRAY) {
  3190	                append_type_mask(return_value, MAY_BE_ARRAY);
  3191	        }
  3192	        if (type_mask & MAY_BE_STRING) {
  3193	                append_type_mask(return_value, MAY_BE_STRING);
  3194	        }
  3195	        if (type_mask & MAY_BE_LONG) {
  3196	                append_type_mask(return_value, MAY_BE_LONG);
  3197	        }
  3198	        if (type_mask & MAY_BE_DOUBLE) {
  3199	                append_type_mask(return_value, MAY_BE_DOUBLE);
  3200	        }
  3201	        if ((type_mask & MAY_BE_BOOL) == MAY_BE_BOOL) {
  3202	                append_type_mask(return_value, MAY_BE_BOOL);
  3203	        } else if (type_mask & MAY_BE_TRUE) {
  3204	                append_type_mask(return_value, MAY_BE_TRUE);
  3205	        } else if (type_mask & MAY_BE_FALSE) {
  3206	                append_type_mask(return_value, MAY_BE_FALSE);
  3207	        }
  3208	        if (type_mask & MAY_BE_NULL) {
  3209	                append_type_mask(return_value, MAY_BE_NULL);
  3210	        }
  3211	}

  3214	/* {{{ Returns the types that are part of this intersection type */
  3215	ZEND_METHOD(ReflectionIntersectionType, getTypes)

  3218	        type_reference *param;

  3233	/* {{{ Constructor. Throws an Exception in case the given method does not exist */
  3234	static void instantiate_reflection_method(INTERNAL_FUNCTION_PARAMETERS, bool is_constructor)

  3248	        reflection_object *intern;
  3249	        zend_function *mptr;
  3250	
  3251	        if (is_constructor) {
  3252	                if (ZEND_NUM_ARGS() == 1) {
  3253	                        zend_error(E_DEPRECATED, "Calling ReflectionMethod::__construct() with 1 argument is deprecated, "
  3254	                                "use ReflectionMethod::createFromMethodName() instead");
  3255	                        if (UNEXPECTED(EG(exception))) {
  3256	                                RETURN_THROWS();
  3257	                        }
  3258	                }
  3259	
  3260	                ZEND_PARSE_PARAMETERS_START(1, 2)
  3261	                        Z_PARAM_OBJ_OR_STR(arg1_obj, arg1_str)
  3262	                        Z_PARAM_OPTIONAL
  3263	                        Z_PARAM_STR_OR_NULL(arg2_str)
  3264	                ZEND_PARSE_PARAMETERS_END();
  3265	        } else {
  3266	                ZEND_PARSE_PARAMETERS_START(1, 1)
  3267	                        Z_PARAM_STR(arg1_str)
  3268	                ZEND_PARSE_PARAMETERS_END();
  3269	        }
  3270	
  3271	        if (arg1_obj) {
  3272	                if (!arg2_str) {
  3273	                        zend_argument_value_error(2, "cannot be null when argument #1 ($objectOrMethod) is an object");
  3274	                        RETURN_THROWS();
  3275	                }
  3276	
  3277	                orig_obj = arg1_obj;
  3278	                ce = arg1_obj->ce;
  3279	                method_name = ZSTR_VAL(arg2_str);
  3280	                method_name_len = ZSTR_LEN(arg2_str);
  3281	        } else if (arg2_str) {
  3282	                class_name = zend_string_copy(arg1_str);
  3283	                method_name = ZSTR_VAL(arg2_str);
  3284	                method_name_len = ZSTR_LEN(arg2_str);
  3285	        } else {
  3286	                char *tmp;
  3287	                size_t tmp_len;
  3288	                char *name = ZSTR_VAL(arg1_str);
  3289	
  3290	                if ((tmp = strstr(name, "::")) == NULL) {
  3291	                        zend_argument_error(reflection_exception_ptr, 1, "must be a valid method name");
  3292	                        RETURN_THROWS();
  3293	                }
  3294	                tmp_len = tmp - name;
  3295	
  3296	                class_name = zend_string_init(name, tmp_len, 0);
  3297	                method_name = tmp + 2;
  3298	                method_name_len = ZSTR_LEN(arg1_str) - tmp_len - 2;
  3299	        }
  3300	
  3301	        if (class_name) {
  3302	                if ((ce = zend_lookup_class(class_name)) == NULL) {
  3303	                        if (!EG(exception)) {
  3304	                                zend_throw_exception_ex(reflection_exception_ptr, 0, "Class \"%s\" does not exist", ZSTR_VAL(class_name));
  3305	                        }
  3306	                        zend_string_release(class_name);
  3307	                        RETURN_THROWS();
  3308	                }
  3309	
  3310	                zend_string_release(class_name);
  3311	        }
  3312	
  3313	        if (is_constructor) {
  3314	                object = ZEND_THIS;
  3315	        } else {
  3316	                object_init_ex(return_value, execute_data->This.value.ce ? execute_data->This.value.ce : reflection_method_ptr);
  3317	                object = return_value;
  3318	        }
  3319	        intern = Z_REFLECTION_P(object);
  3320	
  3321	        lcname = zend_str_tolower_dup(method_name, method_name_len);
  3322	
  3323	        if (ce == zend_ce_closure && orig_obj && (method_name_len == sizeof(ZEND_INVOKE_FUNC_NAME)-1)
  3324	                && memcmp(lcname, ZEND_INVOKE_FUNC_NAME, sizeof(ZEND_INVOKE_FUNC_NAME)-1) == 0
  3325	                && (mptr = zend_get_closure_invoke_method(orig_obj)) != NULL)
  3326	        {
  3327	                /* do nothing, mptr already set */
  3328	        } else if ((mptr = zend_hash_str_find_ptr(&ce->function_table, lcname, method_name_len)) == NULL) {
  3329	                efree(lcname);
  3330	                zend_throw_exception_ex(reflection_exception_ptr, 0,
  3331	                        "Method %s::%s() does not exist", ZSTR_VAL(ce->name), method_name);
  3332	                RETURN_THROWS();
  3333	        }
  3334	        efree(lcname);
  3335	
  3336	        ZVAL_STR_COPY(reflection_prop_name(object), mptr->common.function_name);
  3337	        ZVAL_STR_COPY(reflection_prop_class(object), mptr->common.scope->name);
  3338	        intern->ptr = mptr;
  3339	        intern->ref_type = REF_TYPE_FUNCTION;
  3340	        intern->ce = ce;
  3341	}
  3342	
  3343	/* {{{ Constructor. Throws an Exception in case the given method does not exist */
  3344	ZEND_METHOD(ReflectionMethod, __construct) {
  3345	        instantiate_reflection_method(INTERNAL_FUNCTION_PARAM_PASSTHRU, true);
  3346	}
  3347	/* }}} */
  3348	
  3349	ZEND_METHOD(ReflectionMethod, createFromMethodName) {
  3350	        instantiate_reflection_method(INTERNAL_FUNCTION_PARAM_PASSTHRU, false);
  3351	}
  3352	
  3353	/* {{{ Returns a string representation */
  3354	ZEND_METHOD(ReflectionMethod, __toString)
  3355	{
  3356	        reflection_object *intern;
  3357	        zend_function *mptr;
  3358	        smart_str str = {0};
  3359	
  3360	        ZEND_PARSE_PARAMETERS_NONE();
  3361	        GET_REFLECTION_OBJECT_PTR(mptr);
  3362	        _function_string(&str, mptr, intern->ce, "");
  3363	        RETURN_STR(smart_str_extract(&str));
  3364	}
  3365	/* }}} */
  3366	
  3367	/* {{{ Invokes the function */
  3368	ZEND_METHOD(ReflectionMethod, getClosure)
  3369	{
  3370	        reflection_object *intern;
  3371	        zval *obj = NULL;
  3372	        zend_function *mptr;
  3373	
  3374	        if (zend_parse_parameters(ZEND_NUM_ARGS(), "|o!", &obj) == FAILURE) {
  3375	                RETURN_THROWS();
  3376	        }
  3377	
  3378	        GET_REFLECTION_OBJECT_PTR(mptr);
  3379	
  3380	        if (mptr->common.fn_flags & ZEND_ACC_STATIC)  {
  3381	                zend_create_fake_closure(return_value, mptr, mptr->common.scope, mptr->common.scope, NULL);
  3382	        } else {
  3383	                if (!obj) {
  3384	                        zend_argument_value_error(1, "cannot be null for non-static methods");
  3385	                        RETURN_THROWS();
  3386	                }
  3387	
  3388	                if (!instanceof_function(Z_OBJCE_P(obj), mptr->common.scope)) {
  3389	                        _DO_THROW("Given object is not an instance of the class this method was declared in");
  3390	                        RETURN_THROWS();
  3391	                }
  3392	
  3393	                /* This is an original closure object and __invoke is to be called. */
  3394	                if (Z_OBJCE_P(obj) == zend_ce_closure &&
  3395	                        (mptr->internal_function.fn_flags & ZEND_ACC_CALL_VIA_TRAMPOLINE))
  3396	                {
  3397	                        RETURN_OBJ_COPY(Z_OBJ_P(obj));
  3398	                } else {
  3399	                        zend_create_fake_closure(return_value, mptr, mptr->common.scope, Z_OBJCE_P(obj), obj);
  3400	                }
  3401	        }
  3402	}
  3403	/* }}} */
  3404	
  3405	/* {{{ reflection_method_invoke */
  3406	static void reflection_method_invoke(INTERNAL_FUNCTION_PARAMETERS, int variadic)
  3407	{
  3408	        zval retval;
  3409	        zval *params = NULL, *object;
  3410	        HashTable *named_params = NULL;
  3411	        reflection_object *intern;
  3412	        zend_function *mptr, *callback;
  3413	        uint32_t argc = 0;
  3414	        zend_class_entry *obj_ce;
  3415	
  3416	        GET_REFLECTION_OBJECT_PTR(mptr);
  3417	
  3418	        if (mptr->common.fn_flags & ZEND_ACC_ABSTRACT) {
  3419	                zend_throw_exception_ex(reflection_exception_ptr, 0,
  3420	                        "Trying to invoke abstract method %s::%s()",
  3421	                        ZSTR_VAL(mptr->common.scope->name), ZSTR_VAL(mptr->common.function_name));
  3422	                RETURN_THROWS();
  3423	        }
  3424	
  3425	        if (variadic) {
  3426	                ZEND_PARSE_PARAMETERS_START(1, -1)
  3427	                        Z_PARAM_OBJECT_OR_NULL(object)
  3428	                        Z_PARAM_VARIADIC_WITH_NAMED(params, argc, named_params)
  3429	                ZEND_PARSE_PARAMETERS_END();
  3430	        } else {
  3431	                if (zend_parse_parameters(ZEND_NUM_ARGS(), "o!h", &object, &named_params) == FAILURE) {
  3432	                        RETURN_THROWS();
  3433	                }
  3434	        }
  3435	
  3436	        /* In case this is a static method, we shouldn't pass an object_ptr
  3437	         * (which is used as calling context aka $this). We can thus ignore the
  3438	         * first parameter.
  3439	         *
  3440	         * Else, we verify that the given object is an instance of the class.
  3441	         */
  3442	        if (mptr->common.fn_flags & ZEND_ACC_STATIC) {
  3443	                object = NULL;
  3444	                obj_ce = mptr->common.scope;
  3445	        } else {
  3446	                if (!object) {
  3447	                        zend_throw_exception_ex(reflection_exception_ptr, 0,
  3448	                                "Trying to invoke non static method %s::%s() without an object",
  3449	                                ZSTR_VAL(mptr->common.scope->name), ZSTR_VAL(mptr->common.function_name));
  3450	                        RETURN_THROWS();
  3451	                }
  3452	
  3453	                obj_ce = Z_OBJCE_P(object);
  3454	
  3455	                if (!instanceof_function(obj_ce, mptr->common.scope)) {
  3456	                        if (!variadic) {
  3457	                                efree(params);
  3458	                        }
  3459	                        _DO_THROW("Given object is not an instance of the class this method was declared in");
  3460	                        RETURN_THROWS();
  3461	                }
  3462	        }
  3463	        /* Copy the zend_function when calling via handler (e.g. Closure::__invoke()) */
  3464	        callback = _copy_function(mptr);
  3465	        zend_call_known_function(callback, (object ? Z_OBJ_P(object) : NULL), intern->ce, &retval, argc, params, named_params);
  3466	
  3467	        if (Z_TYPE(retval) == IS_UNDEF && !EG(exception)) {
  3468	                zend_throw_exception_ex(reflection_exception_ptr, 0,
  3469	                        "Invocation of method %s::%s() failed", ZSTR_VAL(mptr->common.scope->name), ZSTR_VAL(mptr->common.function_name));
  3470	                RETURN_THROWS();
  3471	        }
  3472	
  3473	        if (Z_ISREF(retval)) {
  3474	                zend_unwrap_reference(&retval);
  3475	        }
  3476	        ZVAL_COPY_VALUE(return_value, &retval);
  3477	}
  3478	/* }}} */
  3479	
  3480	/* {{{ Invokes the method. */
  3481	ZEND_METHOD(ReflectionMethod, invoke)
  3482	{
  3483	        reflection_method_invoke(INTERNAL_FUNCTION_PARAM_PASSTHRU, 1);
  3484	}
  3485	/* }}} */
  3486	
  3487	/* {{{ Invokes the function and pass its arguments as array. */
  3488	ZEND_METHOD(ReflectionMethod, invokeArgs)
  3489	{
  3490	        reflection_method_invoke(INTERNAL_FUNCTION_PARAM_PASSTHRU, 0);
  3491	}
  3492	/* }}} */

   996	static void _property_string(smart_str *str, zend_property_info *prop, const char *prop_name, const char* indent)
   997	{
   998	        if (prop && prop->doc_comment) {
   999	                smart_str_append_printf(str, "%s%s\n", indent, ZSTR_VAL(prop->doc_comment));
  1000	        }
  1001	        smart_str_append_printf(str, "%sProperty [ ", indent);
  1002	        if (!prop) {
  1003	                smart_str_append_printf(str, "<dynamic> public $%s", prop_name);
  1004	        } else {
  1005	                if (prop->flags & ZEND_ACC_ABSTRACT) {
  1006	                        smart_str_appends(str, "abstract ");
  1007	                }
  1008	                if (prop->flags & ZEND_ACC_FINAL) {
  1009	                        smart_str_appends(str, "final ");
  1010	                }
  1011	                /* These are mutually exclusive */
  1012	                switch (prop->flags & ZEND_ACC_PPP_MASK) {
  1013	                        case ZEND_ACC_PUBLIC:
  1014	                                smart_str_appends(str, "public ");
  1015	                                break;
  1016	                        case ZEND_ACC_PRIVATE:
  1017	                                smart_str_appends(str, "private ");
  1018	                                break;
  1019	                        case ZEND_ACC_PROTECTED:
  1020	                                smart_str_appends(str, "protected ");
  1021	                                break;
  1022	                }
  1023	                switch (prop->flags & ZEND_ACC_PPP_SET_MASK) {
  1024	                        case ZEND_ACC_PRIVATE_SET:
  1025	                                smart_str_appends(str, "private(set) ");
  1026	                                break;
  1027	                        case ZEND_ACC_PROTECTED_SET:
  1028	                                smart_str_appends(str, "protected(set) ");
  1029	                                break;
  1030	                        case ZEND_ACC_PUBLIC_SET:
  1031	                                ZEND_UNREACHABLE();
  1032	                                break;
  1033	                }
  1034	                if (prop->flags & ZEND_ACC_STATIC) {
  1035	                        smart_str_appends(str, "static ");
  1036	                }
  1037	                if (prop->flags & ZEND_ACC_READONLY) {
  1038	                        smart_str_appends(str, "readonly ");
  1039	                }
  1040	                if (ZEND_TYPE_IS_SET(prop->type)) {
  1041	                        zend_string *type_str = zend_type_to_string(prop->type);
  1042	                        smart_str_append(str, type_str);
  1043	                        smart_str_appendc(str, ' ');
  1044	                        zend_string_release(type_str);
  1045	                }
  1046	                if (!prop_name) {
  1047	                        const char *class_name;
  1048	                        zend_unmangle_property_name(prop->name, &class_name, &prop_name);
  1049	                }
  1050	                smart_str_append_printf(str, "$%s", prop_name);
  1051	
  1052	                zval *default_value = property_get_default(prop);
  1053	                if (default_value && !Z_ISUNDEF_P(default_value)) {
  1054	                        smart_str_appends(str, " = ");
  1055	                        format_default_value(str, default_value);
  1056	                }
  1057	        }
  1058	
  1059	        smart_str_appends(str, " ]\n");
  1060	}

  1062	
  1063	static void _extension_ini_string(const zend_ini_entry *ini_entry, smart_str *str, const char *indent, int number) /* {{{ */
  1064	{
  1065	        char *comma = "";
  1066	
  1067	        if (number == ini_entry->module_number) {
  1068	                smart_str_append_printf(str, "    %sEntry [ %s <", indent, ZSTR_VAL(ini_entry->name));
  1069	                if (ini_entry->modifiable == ZEND_INI_ALL) {
  1070	                        smart_str_appends(str, "ALL");
  1071	                } else {
  1072	                        if (ini_entry->modifiable & ZEND_INI_USER) {
  1073	                                smart_str_appends(str, "USER");
  1074	                                comma = ",";
  1075	                        }
  1076	                        if (ini_entry->modifiable & ZEND_INI_PERDIR) {
  1077	                                smart_str_append_printf(str, "%sPERDIR", comma);
  1078	                                comma = ",";
  1079	                        }
  1080	                        if (ini_entry->modifiable & ZEND_INI_SYSTEM) {
  1081	                                smart_str_append_printf(str, "%sSYSTEM", comma);
  1082	                        }
  1083	                }
  1084	
  1085	                smart_str_appends(str, "> ]\n");
  1086	                smart_str_append_printf(str, "    %s  Current = '%s'\n", indent, ini_entry->value ? ZSTR_VAL(ini_entry->value) : "");
  1087	                if (ini_entry->modified) {
  1088	                        smart_str_append_printf(str, "    %s  Default = '%s'\n", indent, ini_entry->orig_value ? ZSTR_VAL(ini_entry->orig_value) : "");
  1089	                }
  1090	                smart_str_append_printf(str, "    %s}\n", indent);
  1091	        }
  1092	}
  1093	/* }}} */
  1094

  1099	                if (zend_string_equals_ci(ce->name, key)) {

str_replace_editor create /testbed/test_hooks.php --file_text '<?php

interface IHookedDemo {
    public mixed $prop1 { get; }
    public mixed $prop2 { set; }
    public mixed $prop3 { get; set; }
}
abstract class HookedDemo {
    abstract public mixed $prop1 { get; }
    abstract public mixed $prop2 { set; }
    abstract public mixed $prop3 { get; set; }
}
class WithHooks {
    public mixed $prop1 {
        get => "always this string";
    }
    public mixed $prop2 {
        set => strtolower($value);
    }
    public mixed $prop3 {
        get => $this->prop3;
        set => strtolower($value);
    }
}
class WithFinalHooks {
    public mixed $prop1 {
        final get => "always this string";
    }
    public mixed $prop2 {
        final set => strtolower($value);
    }
    public mixed $prop3 {
        final get => $this->prop3;
        final set => strtolower($value);
    }
}

$classes = [
    IHookedDemo::class,
    HookedDemo::class,
    WithHooks::class,
    WithFinalHooks::class,
];

foreach ( $classes as $clazz ) {
    echo "$clazz:\n";
    $ref = new ReflectionClass( $clazz );
    echo $ref;
    foreach ( [ '"'"'prop1'"'"', '"'"'prop2'"'"', '"'"'prop3'"'"' ] as $prop ) {
        try {
            $propRef = new ReflectionProperty( $clazz, $prop );
            echo $propRef;
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            echo "Error for $prop: " . $e->getMessage() . "\n";
        }
    }
    echo "\n";
}'

Now I understand the issue. The `_property_string` function needs to be enhanced to detect and indicate property hooks. Looking at the code, I can see that property hooks are stored in `prop->hooks` array, where:
- `hooks[ZEND_PROPERTY_HOOK_GET]` is present if the property has a get hook
- `hooks[ZEND_PROPERTY_HOOK_SET]` is present if the property has a set hook

Let me modify the `_property_string` function to include hook information:

🎬 ACTION
str_replace_editor str_replace /testbed/ext/reflection/php_reflection.c   --old_str '/* {{{ _property_string */
static void _property_string(smart_str *str, zend_property_info *prop, const char *prop_name, const char* indent)
{
        if (prop && prop->doc_comment) {
                smart_str_append_printf(str, "%s%s\n", indent, ZSTR_VAL(prop->doc_comment));
        }
        smart_str_append_printf(str, "%sProperty [ ", indent);
        if (!prop) {
                smart_str_append_printf(str, "<dynamic> public $%s", prop_name);
        } else {
                if (prop->flags & ZEND_ACC_ABSTRACT) {
                        smart_str_appends(str, "abstract ");
                }
                if (prop->flags & ZEND_ACC_FINAL) {
                        smart_str_appends(str, "final ");
                }
                /* These are mutually exclusive */
                switch (prop->flags & ZEND_ACC_PPP_MASK) {
                        case ZEND_ACC_PUBLIC:
                                smart_str_appends(str, "public ");
                                break;
                        case ZEND_ACC_PRIVATE:
                                smart_str_appends(str, "private ");
                                break;
                        case ZEND_ACC_PROTECTED:
                                smart_str_appends(str, "protected ");
                                break;
                }
                switch (prop->flags & ZEND_ACC_PPP_SET_MASK) {
                        case ZEND_ACC_PRIVATE_SET:
                                smart_str_appends(str, "private(set) ");
                                break;
                        case ZEND_ACC_PROTECTED_SET:
                                smart_str_appends(str, "protected(set) ");
                                break;
                        case ZEND_ACC_PUBLIC_SET:
                                ZEND_UNREACHABLE();
                                break;
                }
                if (prop->flags & ZEND_ACC_STATIC) {
                        smart_str_appends(str, "static ");
                }
                if (prop->flags & ZEND_ACC_READONLY) {
                        smart_str_appends(str, "readonly ");
                }
                if (ZEND_TYPE_IS_SET(prop->type)) {
                        zend_string *type_str = zend_type_to_string(prop->type);
                        smart_str_append(str, type_str);
                        smart_str_appendc(str, '"'"' '"'"');
                        zend_string_release(type_str);
                }
                if (!prop_name) {
                        const char *class_name;
                        zend_unmangle_property_name(prop->name, &class_name, &prop_name);
                }
                smart_str_append_printf(str, "$%s", prop_name);

                zval *default_value = property_get_default(prop);
                if (default_value && !Z_ISUNDEF_P(default_value)) {
                        smart_str_appends(str, " = ");
                        format_default_value(str, default_value);
                }
        }

        smart_str_appends(str, " ]\n");
}
/* }}} */' --new_str '/* {{{ _property_string */
static void _property_string(smart_str *str, zend_property_info *prop, const char *prop_name, const char* indent)
{
        if (prop && prop->doc_comment) {
                smart_str_append_printf(str, "%s%s\n", indent, ZSTR_VAL(prop->doc_comment));
        }
        smart_str_append_printf(str, "%sProperty [ ", indent);
        if (!prop) {
                smart_str_append_printf(str, "<dynamic> public $%s", prop_name);
        } else {
                if (prop->flags & ZEND_ACC_ABSTRACT) {
                        smart_str_appends(str, "abstract ");
                }
                if (prop->flags & ZEND_ACC_FINAL) {
                        smart_str_appends(str, "final ");
                }
                /* These are mutually exclusive */
                switch (prop->flags & ZEND_ACC_PPP_MASK) {
                        case ZEND_ACC_PUBLIC:
                                smart_str_appends(str, "public ");
                                break;
                        case ZEND_ACC_PRIVATE:
                                smart_str_appends(str, "private ");
                                break;
                        case ZEND_ACC_PROTECTED:
                                smart_str_appends(str, "protected ");
                                break;
                }
                switch (prop->flags & ZEND_ACC_PPP_SET_MASK) {
                        case ZEND_ACC_PRIVATE_SET:
                                smart_str_appends(str, "private(set) ");
                                break;
                        case ZEND_ACC_PROTECTED_SET:
                                smart_str_appends(str, "protected(set) ");
                                break;
                        case ZEND_ACC_PUBLIC_SET:
                                ZEND_UNREACHABLE();
                                break;
                }
                if (prop->flags & ZEND_ACC_STATIC) {
                        smart_str_appends(str, "static ");
                }
                if (prop->flags & ZEND_ACC_READONLY) {
                        smart_str_appends(str, "readonly ");
                }
                /* Indicate property hooks */
                if (prop->hooks) {
                        bool has_get_hook = prop->hooks[ZEND_PROPERTY_HOOK_GET] != NULL;
                        bool has_set_hook = prop->hooks[ZEND_PROPERTY_HOOK_SET] != NULL;
                        
                        if (has_get_hook && has_set_hook) {
                                smart_str_appends(str, "{ get; set; } ");
                        } else if (has_get_hook) {
                                smart_str_appends(str, "{ get; } ");
                        } else if (has_set_hook) {
                                smart_str_appends(str, "{ set; } ");
                        }
                }
                if (ZEND_TYPE_IS_SET(prop->type)) {
                        zend_string *type_str = zend_type_to_string(prop->type);
                        smart_str_append(str, type_str);
                        smart_str_appendc(str, '"'"' '"'"');
                        zend_string_release(type_str);
                }
                if (!prop_name) {
                        const char *class_name;
                        zend_unmangle_property_name(prop->name, &class_name, &prop_name);
                }
                smart_str_append_printf(str, "$%s", prop_name);

                zval *default_value = property_get_default(prop);
                if (default_value && !Z_ISUNDEF_P(default_value)) {
                        smart_str_appends(str, " = ");
                        format_default_value(str, default_value);
                }
        }

        smart_str_appends(str, " ]\n");
}

    }
    public mixed $prop2 {
        final set => strtolower($value);
    }
    public mixed $prop3 {
        final get => $this->prop3;
        final set => strtolower($value);
    }
}

class ExtendsWithFinalHooks extends WithFinalHooks {
    // Cannot override final hooks
}

// Simpler test case
class SimpleHooks {
    public mixed $prop1 { 
        get => "value1";
    }
    public mixed $prop2 { 
        set => $this->prop2 = $value;
    }
    public mixed $prop3 { 
        get => $this->prop3;
        set => $this->prop3 = $value;
    }
    public mixed $prop4; // no hooks
}

    echo $prop;
}

+        } else if (ce->ce_flags & ZEND_ACC_TRAIT) {
+                smart_str_appends(str, "trait ");
+        } else if (ce->ce_flags & ZEND_ACC_ENUM) {
+                smart_str_appends(str, "enum ");
+        } else {
+                if (ce->ce_flags & (ZEND_ACC_IMPLICIT_ABSTRACT_CLASS|ZEND_ACC_EXPLICIT_ABSTRACT_CLASS)) {
+                        smart_str_appends(str, "abstract ");
+                }
+                if (ce->ce_flags & ZEND_ACC_FINAL) {
+                        smart_str_appends(str, "final ");
+                }
+                if (ce->ce_flags & ZEND_ACC_READONLY_CLASS) {
+                        smart_str_appends(str, "readonly ");
+                }
+                smart_str_appends(str, "class ");
+        }
+        smart_str_append(str, ce->name);
+        if (ce->parent) {
+                smart_str_append_printf(str, " extends %s", ZSTR_VAL(ce->parent->name));
+        }
+
+        // Show backing type of enums
+        if ((ce->ce_flags & ZEND_ACC_ENUM) && (ce->enum_backing_type != IS_UNDEF)) {
+                smart_str_appends(str,
+                        ce->enum_backing_type == IS_STRING ? ": string" : ": int"
+                );
+        }
+        if (ce->num_interfaces) {
+                uint32_t i;
+
+                ZEND_ASSERT(ce->ce_flags & ZEND_ACC_LINKED);
+                if (ce->ce_flags & ZEND_ACC_INTERFACE) {
+                        smart_str_append_printf(str, " extends %s", ZSTR_VAL(ce->interfaces[0]->name));
+                } else {
+                        smart_str_append_printf(str, " implements %s", ZSTR_VAL(ce->interfaces[0]->name));
+                }
+                for (i = 1; i < ce->num_interfaces; ++i) {
+                        smart_str_append_printf(str, ", %s", ZSTR_VAL(ce->interfaces[i]->name));
+                }
+        }
+        smart_str_appends(str, " ] {\n");
+
+        /* The information where a class is declared is only available for user classes */
+        if (ce->type == ZEND_USER_CLASS) {
+                smart_str_append_printf(str, "%s  @@ %s %d-%d\n", indent, ZSTR_VAL(ce->info.user.filename),
+                                                ce->info.user.line_start, ce->info.user.line_end);
+        }
+
+        /* Constants */
+        uint32_t total_count = zend_hash_num_elements(&ce->constants_table);
+        uint32_t constant_count = 0;
+        uint32_t enum_case_count = 0;
+        smart_str constant_str = {0};
+        smart_str enum_case_str = {0};
+        /* So that we don't need to loop through all of the constants multiple
+         * times (count the constants vs. enum cases, print the constants, print
+         * the enum cases) use some temporary helper smart strings. */
+        if (total_count > 0) {
+                zend_string *key;
+                zend_class_constant *c;
+
+                ZEND_HASH_MAP_FOREACH_STR_KEY_PTR(CE_CONSTANTS_TABLE(ce), key, c) {
+                        if (ZEND_CLASS_CONST_FLAGS(c) & ZEND_CLASS_CONST_IS_CASE) {
+                                _enum_case_string(&enum_case_str, key, c, ZSTR_VAL(sub_indent));
+                                enum_case_count++;
+                        } else {
+                                _class_const_string(&constant_str, key, c, ZSTR_VAL(sub_indent));
+                                constant_count++;
+                        }
+                        if (UNEXPECTED(EG(exception))) {
+                                zend_string_release(sub_indent);
+                                smart_str_free(&enum_case_str);
+                                smart_str_free(&constant_str);
+                                return;
+                        }
+                } ZEND_HASH_FOREACH_END();
+        }
+        // Enum cases go first, but the heading is only shown if there are any
+        if (enum_case_count) {
+                smart_str_appendc(str, '\n');
+                smart_str_append_printf(str, "%s  - Enum cases [%d] {\n", indent, enum_case_count);
+                smart_str_append_smart_str(str, &enum_case_str);
+                smart_str_append_printf(str, "%s  }\n", indent);
+        }
+        smart_str_appendc(str, '\n');
+        smart_str_append_printf(str, "%s  - Constants [%d] {\n", indent, constant_count);
+        smart_str_append_smart_str(str, &constant_str);
+        smart_str_append_printf(str, "%s  }\n", indent);
+
+        smart_str_free(&enum_case_str);
+        smart_str_free(&constant_str);
+
+        /* Static properties */
+        /* counting static properties */
+        count = zend_hash_num_elements(&ce->properties_info);
+        if (count > 0) {
+                zend_property_info *prop;
+
+                ZEND_HASH_MAP_FOREACH_PTR(&ce->properties_info, prop) {
+                        if ((prop->flags & ZEND_ACC_PRIVATE) && prop->ce != ce) {
+                                count_shadow_props++;
+                        } else if (prop->flags & ZEND_ACC_STATIC) {
+                                count_static_props++;
+                        }
+                } ZEND_HASH_FOREACH_END();
+        }
+
+        /* static properties */
+        smart_str_append_printf(str, "\n%s  - Static properties [%d] {\n", indent, count_static_props);
+        if (count_static_props > 0) {
+                zend_property_info *prop;
+
+                ZEND_HASH_MAP_FOREACH_PTR(&ce->properties_info, prop) {
+                        if ((prop->flags & ZEND_ACC_STATIC) && (!(prop->flags & ZEND_ACC_PRIVATE) || prop->ce == ce)) {
+                                _property_string(str, prop, NULL, ZSTR_VAL(sub_indent));
+                        }
+                } ZEND_HASH_FOREACH_END();
+        }
+        smart_str_append_printf(str, "%s  }\n", indent);
+
+        /* Static methods */
+        /* counting static methods */
+        count = zend_hash_num_elements(&ce->function_table);
+        if (count > 0) {
+                zend_function *mptr;
+
+                ZEND_HASH_MAP_FOREACH_PTR(&ce->function_table, mptr) {
+                        if ((mptr->common.fn_flags & ZEND_ACC_STATIC)
+                                && ((mptr->common.fn_flags & ZEND_ACC_PRIVATE) == 0 || mptr->common.scope == ce))
+                        {
+                                count_static_funcs++;
+                        }
+                } ZEND_HASH_FOREACH_END();
+        }
+
+        /* static methods */
+        smart_str_append_printf(str, "\n%s  - Static methods [%d] {", indent, count_static_funcs);
+        if (count_static_funcs > 0) {
+                zend_function *mptr;
+
+                ZEND_HASH_MAP_FOREACH_PTR(&ce->function_table, mptr) {
+                        if ((mptr->common.fn_flags & ZEND_ACC_STATIC)
+                                && ((mptr->common.fn_flags & ZEND_ACC_PRIVATE) == 0 || mptr->common.scope == ce))
+                        {
+                                smart_str_appendc(str, '\n');
+                                _function_string(str, mptr, ce, ZSTR_VAL(sub_indent));
+                        }
+                } ZEND_HASH_FOREACH_END();
+        } else {
+                smart_str_appendc(str, '\n');
+        }
+        smart_str_append_printf(str, "%s  }\n", indent);
+
+        /* Default/Implicit properties */
+        count = zend_hash_num_elements(&ce->properties_info) - count_static_props - count_shadow_props;
+        smart_str_append_printf(str, "\n%s  - Properties [%d] {\n", indent, count);
+        if (count > 0) {
+                zend_property_info *prop;
+
+                ZEND_HASH_MAP_FOREACH_PTR(&ce->properties_info, prop) {
+                        if (!(prop->flags & ZEND_ACC_STATIC)
+                         && (!(prop->flags & ZEND_ACC_PRIVATE) || prop->ce == ce)) {
+                                _property_string(str, prop, NULL, ZSTR_VAL(sub_indent));
+                        }
+                } ZEND_HASH_FOREACH_END();
+        }
+        smart_str_append_printf(str, "%s  }\n", indent);
+
+        if (obj && Z_TYPE_P(obj) == IS_OBJECT) {
+                HashTable    *properties = zend_get_properties_no_lazy_init(Z_OBJ_P(obj));
+                zend_string  *prop_name;
+                smart_str prop_str = {0};
+
+                count = 0;
+                if (properties && zend_hash_num_elements(properties)) {
+                        ZEND_HASH_FOREACH_STR_KEY(properties, prop_name) {
+                                if (prop_name && ZSTR_LEN(prop_name) && ZSTR_VAL(prop_name)[0]) { /* skip all private and protected properties */
+                                        if (!zend_hash_exists(&ce->properties_info, prop_name)) {
+                                                count++;
+                                                _property_string(&prop_str, NULL, ZSTR_VAL(prop_name), ZSTR_VAL(sub_indent));
+                                        }
+                                }
+                        } ZEND_HASH_FOREACH_END();
+                }
+
+                smart_str_append_printf(str, "\n%s  - Dynamic properties [%d] {\n", indent, count);
+                smart_str_append_smart_str(str, &prop_str);
+                smart_str_append_printf(str, "%s  }\n", indent);
+                smart_str_free(&prop_str);
+        }
+
+        /* Non static methods */
+        count = zend_hash_num_elements(&ce->function_table) - count_static_funcs;
+        if (count > 0) {
+                zend_function *mptr;
+                smart_str method_str = {0};
+
+                count = 0;
+                ZEND_HASH_MAP_FOREACH_PTR(&ce->function_table, mptr) {
+                        if ((mptr->common.fn_flags & ZEND_ACC_STATIC) == 0
+                                && ((mptr->common.fn_flags & ZEND_ACC_PRIVATE) == 0 || mptr->common.scope == ce))
+                        {
+                                zend_function *closure;
+                                /* see if this is a closure */
+                                if (obj && is_closure_invoke(ce, mptr->common.function_name)
+                                        && (closure = zend_get_closure_invoke_method(Z_OBJ_P(obj))) != NULL)
+                                {
+                                        mptr = closure;
+                                } else {
+                                        closure = NULL;
+                                }
+                                smart_str_appendc(&method_str, '\n');
+                                _function_string(&method_str, mptr, ce, ZSTR_VAL(sub_indent));
+                                count++;
+                                _free_function(closure);
+                        }
+                } ZEND_HASH_FOREACH_END();
+                smart_str_append_printf(str, "\n%s  - Methods [%d] {", indent, count);
+                smart_str_append_smart_str(str, &method_str);
+                if (!count) {
+                        smart_str_appendc(str, '\n');
+                }
+                smart_str_free(&method_str);
+        } else {
+                smart_str_append_printf(str, "\n%s  - Methods [0] {\n", indent);
+        }
+        smart_str_append_printf(str, "%s  }\n", indent);
+
+        smart_str_append_printf(str, "%s}\n", indent);
+        zend_string_release_ex(sub_indent, 0);
 }
 /* }}} */

 #undef DUMP_CONST_FLAG

-	}

-	smart_str_appends(str, type);
-	smart_str_appendc(str, ' ');
-	smart_str_appends(str, name);

+        smart_str_appends(str, name);

-	if (Z_TYPE_P(value) == IS_ARRAY) {

-		smart_str_append(str, value_str);

-	}

+        } else if (Z_TYPE_P(value) == IS_STRING) {

 /* {{{ _class_const_string */
 static void _class_const_string(smart_str *str, const zend_string *name, zend_class_constant *c, const char *indent)
 {

+        if (Z_TYPE(c->value) == IS_CONSTANT_AST && zend_update_class_constant(c, name, c->ce) == FAILURE) {
+                return;
+        }
+

+        const char *final = ZEND_CLASS_CONST_FLAGS(c) & ZEND_ACC_FINAL ? "final " : "";

+

+                indent, final, visibility, type, ZSTR_VAL(name));

+                smart_str_appends(str, "Object");

+                smart_str_append(str, value_str);
+                zend_tmp_string_release(tmp_value_str);
+        }
+        smart_str_appends(str, " }\n");
+
+        if (type_str) {
+                zend_string_release(type_str);
+        }
 }
 /* }}} */
 
 static void _enum_case_string(smart_str *str, const zend_string *name, zend_class_constant *c, const char *indent)
 {
-	if (Z_TYPE(c->value) == IS_CONSTANT_AST && zend_update_class_constant(c, name, c->ce) == FAILURE) {
-		return;
-	}
-
-	if (c->doc_comment) {
-		smart_str_append_printf(str, "%s%s\n", indent, ZSTR_VAL(c->doc_comment));
-	}
-	smart_str_append_printf(str, "%sCase %s", indent, ZSTR_VAL(name));
-	if (c->ce->enum_backing_type == IS_UNDEF) {
-		// No value
-		smart_str_appendc(str, '\n');
-	} else {
-		/* Has a value, which is the enum instance, get the value from that.
-		 * We know it must be either a string or integer so no need
-		 * for the IS_ARRAY or IS_OBJECT handling that _class_const_string()
-		 * requires. */
-		zval *enum_val = zend_enum_fetch_case_value(Z_OBJ(c->value));
-		zend_string *tmp_value_str;
-		zend_string *value_str = zval_get_tmp_string(enum_val, &tmp_value_str);
-		smart_str_append_printf(str, " = %s\n", ZSTR_VAL(value_str));
-		zend_tmp_string_release(tmp_value_str);
-	}
+        if (Z_TYPE(c->value) == IS_CONSTANT_AST && zend_update_class_constant(c, name, c->ce) == FAILURE) {
+                return;
+        }
+
+        if (c->doc_comment) {
+                smart_str_append_printf(str, "%s%s\n", indent, ZSTR_VAL(c->doc_comment));
+        }
+        smart_str_append_printf(str, "%sCase %s", indent, ZSTR_VAL(name));
+        if (c->ce->enum_backing_type == IS_UNDEF) {
+                // No value
+                smart_str_appendc(str, '\n');
+        } else {
+                /* Has a value, which is the enum instance, get the value from that.
+                 * We know it must be either a string or integer so no need
+                 * for the IS_ARRAY or IS_OBJECT handling that _class_const_string()
+                 * requires. */
+                zval *enum_val = zend_enum_fetch_case_value(Z_OBJ(c->value));
+                zend_string *tmp_value_str;
+                zend_string *value_str = zval_get_tmp_string(enum_val, &tmp_value_str);
+                smart_str_append_printf(str, " = %s\n", ZSTR_VAL(value_str));
+                zend_tmp_string_release(tmp_value_str);
+        }
 }
 
 static zend_op *get_recv_op(const zend_op_array *op_array, uint32_t offset)
 {
-	zend_op *op = op_array->opcodes;
-	const zend_op *end = op + op_array->last;
+        zend_op *op = op_array->opcodes;
+        const zend_op *end = op + op_array->last;
 
-	++offset;
-	while (op < end) {
-		if ((op->opcode == ZEND_RECV || op->opcode == ZEND_RECV_INIT
-		    || op->opcode == ZEND_RECV_VARIADIC) && op->op1.num == offset)
-		{
-			return op;
-		}
-		++op;
-	}
-	ZEND_ASSERT(0 && "Failed to find op");
-	return NULL;
+        ++offset;
+        while (op < end) {
+                if ((op->opcode == ZEND_RECV || op->opcode == ZEND_RECV_INIT
+                    || op->opcode == ZEND_RECV_VARIADIC) && op->op1.num == offset)
+                {
+                        return op;
+                }
+                ++op;
+        }
+        ZEND_ASSERT(0 && "Failed to find op");
+        return NULL;
 }
 
 static zval *get_default_from_recv(zend_op_array *op_array, uint32_t offset) {
-	zend_op *recv = get_recv_op(op_array, offset);
-	if (!recv || recv->opcode != ZEND_RECV_INIT) {
-		return NULL;
-	}
+        zend_op *recv = get_recv_op(op_array, offset);
+        if (!recv || recv->opcode != ZEND_RECV_INIT) {
+                return NULL;
+        }
 
-	return RT_CONSTANT(recv, recv->op2);
+        return RT_CONSTANT(recv, recv->op2);
 }
 
 static void format_default_value(smart_str *str, zval *value) {
-	if (smart_str_append_zval(str, value, SIZE_MAX) == SUCCESS) {
-		/* Nothing to do. */
-	} else if (Z_TYPE_P(value) == IS_ARRAY) {
-		zend_string *str_key;
-		zend_long num_key;
-		zval *zv;
-		bool is_list = zend_array_is_list(Z_ARRVAL_P(value));
-		bool first = true;
-		smart_str_appendc(str, '[');
-		ZEND_HASH_FOREACH_KEY_VAL(Z_ARRVAL_P(value), num_key, str_key, zv) {
-			if (!first) {
-				smart_str_appends(str, ", ");
-			}
-			first = false;
-
-			if (!is_list) {
-				if (str_key) {
-					smart_str_appendc(str, '\'');
-					smart_str_append_escaped(str, ZSTR_VAL(str_key), ZSTR_LEN(str_key));
-					smart_str_appendc(str, '\'');
-				} else {
-					smart_str_append_long(str, num_key);
-				}
-				smart_str_appends(str, " => ");
-			}
-			format_default_value(str, zv);
-		} ZEND_HASH_FOREACH_END();
-		smart_str_appendc(str, ']');
-	} else if (Z_TYPE_P(value) == IS_OBJECT) {
-		/* This branch is reached if the constant AST was already evaluated and
-		 * resulted in an object; enums are already handled in smart_str_append_zval()
-		 * (GH-15902) */
-		zend_object *obj = Z_OBJ_P(value);
-		zend_class_entry *class = obj->ce;
-		ZEND_ASSERT(!(class->ce_flags & ZEND_ACC_ENUM));
-		smart_str_appends(str, "object(");
-		smart_str_append(str, class->name);
-		smart_str_appendc(str, ')');
-	} else {
-		ZEND_ASSERT(Z_TYPE_P(value) == IS_CONSTANT_AST);
-		zend_string *ast_str = zend_ast_export("", Z_ASTVAL_P(value), "");
-		smart_str_append(str, ast_str);
-		zend_string_release(ast_str);
-	}
+        if (smart_str_append_zval(str, value, SIZE_MAX) == SUCCESS) {
+                /* Nothing to do. */
+        } else if (Z_TYPE_P(value) == IS_ARRAY) {
+                zend_string *str_key;
+                zend_long num_key;
+                zval *zv;
+                bool is_list = zend_array_is_list(Z_ARRVAL_P(value));
+                bool first = true;
+                smart_str_appendc(str, '[');
+                ZEND_HASH_FOREACH_KEY_VAL(Z_ARRVAL_P(value), num_key, str_key, zv) {
+                        if (!first) {
+                                smart_str_appends(str, ", ");
+                        }
+                        first = false;
+
+                        if (!is_list) {
+                                if (str_key) {
+                                        smart_str_appendc(str, '\'');
+                                        smart_str_append_escaped(str, ZSTR_VAL(str_key), ZSTR_LEN(str_key));
+                                        smart_str_appendc(str, '\'');
+                                } else {
+                                        smart_str_append_long(str, num_key);
+                                }
+                                smart_str_appends(str, " => ");
+                        }
+                        format_default_value(str, zv);
+                } ZEND_HASH_FOREACH_END();
+                smart_str_appendc(str, ']');
+        } else if (Z_TYPE_P(value) == IS_OBJECT) {
+                /* This branch is reached if the constant AST was already evaluated and
+                 * resulted in an object; enums are already handled in smart_str_append_zval()
+                 * (GH-15902) */
+                zend_object *obj = Z_OBJ_P(value);
+                zend_class_entry *class = obj->ce;
+                ZEND_ASSERT(!(class->ce_flags & ZEND_ACC_ENUM));
+                smart_str_appends(str, "object(");
+                smart_str_append(str, class->name);
+                smart_str_appendc(str, ')');
+        } else {
+                ZEND_ASSERT(Z_TYPE_P(value) == IS_CONSTANT_AST);
+                zend_string *ast_str = zend_ast_export("", Z_ASTVAL_P(value), "");
+                smart_str_append(str, ast_str);
+                zend_string_release(ast_str);
+        }
 }
 
 static inline bool has_internal_arg_info(const zend_function *fptr) {
-	return fptr->type == ZEND_INTERNAL_FUNCTION
-		&& !(fptr->common.fn_flags & ZEND_ACC_USER_ARG_INFO);
+        return fptr->type == ZEND_INTERNAL_FUNCTION
+                && !(fptr->common.fn_flags & ZEND_ACC_USER_ARG_INFO);
 }

 }

 static zval *property_get_default(zend_property_info *prop_info) {
-	zend_class_entry *ce = prop_info->ce;

-	} else if (prop_info->flags & ZEND_ACC_VIRTUAL) {
-		return NULL;

-		return &ce->default_properties_table[OBJ_PROP_TO_NUM(prop_info->offset)];
-	}
+        zend_class_entry *ce = prop_info->ce;
+        if (prop_info->flags & ZEND_ACC_STATIC) {
+                zval *prop = &ce->default_static_members_table[prop_info->offset];
+                ZVAL_DEINDIRECT(prop);
+                return prop;
+        } else if (prop_info->flags & ZEND_ACC_VIRTUAL) {
+                return NULL;
+        } else {
+                return &ce->default_properties_table[OBJ_PROP_TO_NUM(prop_info->offset)];
+        }
 }

-			case ZEND_ACC_PRIVATE:

-			case ZEND_ACC_PUBLIC_SET:
-				ZEND_UNREACHABLE();
-				break;
-		}
-		if (prop->flags & ZEND_ACC_STATIC) {
-			smart_str_appends(str, "static ");
-		}
-		if (prop->flags & ZEND_ACC_READONLY) {
-			smart_str_appends(str, "readonly ");
-		}
-		if (ZEND_TYPE_IS_SET(prop->type)) {
-			zend_string *type_str = zend_type_to_string(prop->type);
-			smart_str_append(str, type_str);
-			smart_str_appendc(str, ' ');
-			zend_string_release(type_str);
-		}
-		if (!prop_name) {
-			const char *class_name;
-			zend_unmangle_property_name(prop->name, &class_name, &prop_name);
-		}
-		smart_str_append_printf(str, "$%s", prop_name);
-
-		zval *default_value = property_get_default(prop);
-		if (default_value && !Z_ISUNDEF_P(default_value)) {
-			smart_str_appends(str, " = ");
-			format_default_value(str, default_value);
-		}
-	}
-
-	smart_str_appends(str, " ]\n");
+        if (prop && prop->doc_comment) {
+                smart_str_append_printf(str, "%s%s\n", indent, ZSTR_VAL(prop->doc_comment));
+        }
+        smart_str_append_printf(str, "%sProperty [ ", indent);
+        if (!prop) {
+                smart_str_append_printf(str, "<dynamic> public $%s", prop_name);
+        } else {
+                if (prop->flags & ZEND_ACC_ABSTRACT) {
+                        smart_str_appends(str, "abstract ");
+                }
+                if (prop->flags & ZEND_ACC_FINAL) {
+                        smart_str_appends(str, "final ");
+                }
+                /* These are mutually exclusive */
+                switch (prop->flags & ZEND_ACC_PPP_MASK) {
+                        case ZEND_ACC_PUBLIC:
+                                smart_str_appends(str, "public ");
+                                break;
+                        case ZEND_ACC_PRIVATE:
+                                smart_str_appends(str, "private ");
+                                break;
+                        case ZEND_ACC_PROTECTED:
+                                smart_str_appends(str, "protected ");
+                                break;
+                }
+                switch (prop->flags & ZEND_ACC_PPP_SET_MASK) {
+                        case ZEND_ACC_PRIVATE_SET:
+                                smart_str_appends(str, "private(set) ");
+                                break;
+                        case ZEND_ACC_PROTECTED_SET:
+                                smart_str_appends(str, "protected(set) ");
+                                break;
+                        case ZEND_ACC_PUBLIC_SET:
+                                ZEND_UNREACHABLE();
+                                break;
+                }
+                if (prop->flags & ZEND_ACC_STATIC) {
+                        smart_str_appends(str, "static ");
+                }
+                if (prop->flags & ZEND_ACC_READONLY) {
+                        smart_str_appends(str, "readonly ");
+                }
+                /* Indicate property hooks */
+                if (prop->hooks) {
+                        bool has_get_hook = prop->hooks[ZEND_PROPERTY_HOOK_GET] != NULL;
+                        bool has_set_hook = prop->hooks[ZEND_PROPERTY_HOOK_SET] != NULL;
+                        
+                        if (has_get_hook && has_set_hook) {
+                                smart_str_appends(str, "{ get; set; } ");
+                        } else if (has_get_hook) {
+                                smart_str_appends(str, "{ get; } ");
+                        } else if (has_set_hook) {
+                                smart_str_appends(str, "{ set; } ");
+                        }
+                }
+                if (ZEND_TYPE_IS_SET(prop->type)) {
+                        zend_string *type_str = zend_type_to_string(prop->type);
+                        smart_str_append(str, type_str);
+                        smart_str_appendc(str, ' ');
+                        zend_string_release(type_str);
+                }
+                if (!prop_name) {
+                        const char *class_name;
+                        zend_unmangle_property_name(prop->name, &class_name, &prop_name);
+                }
+                smart_str_append_printf(str, "$%s", prop_name);
+
+                zval *default_value = property_get_default(prop);
+                if (default_value && !Z_ISUNDEF_P(default_value)) {
+                        smart_str_appends(str, " = ");
+                        format_default_value(str, default_value);
+                }
+        }
+
+        smart_str_appends(str, " ]\n");
 }
 /* }}} */

 static void reflect_attributes(INTERNAL_FUNCTION_PARAMETERS, HashTable *attributes,
-		uint32_t offset, zend_class_entry *scope, uint32_t target, zend_string *filename) /* {{{ */
+                uint32_t offset, zend_class_entry *scope, uint32_t target, zend_string *filename) /* {{{ */
 {

-	zend_long flags = 0;
-	zend_class_entry *base = NULL;

+        zend_long flags = 0;

+                                && ((mptr->common.fn_flags & ZEND_ACC_PRIVATE) == 0 || mptr->common.scope == ce))
+                        {
+                                count_static_funcs++;
+                        }
+                } ZEND_HASH_FOREACH_END();
+        }
+
+        /* static methods */
+        smart_str_append_printf(str, "\n%s  - Static methods [%d] {", indent, count_static_funcs);
+        if (count_static_funcs > 0) {
+                zend_function *mptr;
+
+                ZEND_HASH_MAP_FOREACH_PTR(&ce->function_table, mptr) {
+                        if ((mptr->common.fn_flags & ZEND_ACC_STATIC)
+                                && ((mptr->common.fn_flags & ZEND_ACC_PRIVATE) == 0 || mptr->common.scope == ce))
+                        {
+                                smart_str_appendc(str, '\n');
+                                _function_string(str, mptr, ce, ZSTR_VAL(sub_indent));
+                        }
+                } ZEND_HASH_FOREACH_END();
+        } else {
+                smart_str_appendc(str, '\n');
+        }
+        smart_str_append_printf(str, "%s  }\n", indent);
+
+        /* Default/Implicit properties */
+        count = zend_hash_num_elements(&ce->properties_info) - count_static_props - count_shadow_props;
+        smart_str_append_printf(str, "\n%s  - Properties [%d] {\n", indent, count);
+        if (count > 0) {
+                zend_property_info *prop;
+
+                ZEND_HASH_MAP_FOREACH_PTR(&ce->properties_info, prop) {
+                        if (!(prop->flags & ZEND_ACC_STATIC)
+                         && (!(prop->flags & ZEND_ACC_PRIVATE) || prop->ce == ce)) {
+                                _property_string(str, prop, NULL, ZSTR_VAL(sub_indent));
+                        }
+                } ZEND_HASH_FOREACH_END();
+        }
+        smart_str_append_printf(str, "%s  }\n", indent);
+
+        if (obj && Z_TYPE_P(obj) == IS_OBJECT) {
+                HashTable    *properties = zend_get_properties_no_lazy_init(Z_OBJ_P(obj));
+                zend_string  *prop_name;
+                smart_str prop_str = {0};
+
+                count = 0;
+                if (properties && zend_hash_num_elements(properties)) {
+                        ZEND_HASH_FOREACH_STR_KEY(properties, prop_name) {
+                                if (prop_name && ZSTR_LEN(prop_name) && ZSTR_VAL(prop_name)[0]) { /* skip all private and protected properties */
+                                        if (!zend_hash_exists(&ce->properties_info, prop_name)) {
+                                                count++;
+                                                _property_string(&prop_str, NULL, ZSTR_VAL(prop_name), ZSTR_VAL(sub_indent));
+                                        }
+                                }
+                        } ZEND_HASH_FOREACH_END();
+                }
+
+                smart_str_append_printf(str, "\n%s  - Dynamic properties [%d] {\n", indent, count);
+                smart_str_append_smart_str(str, &prop_str);
+                smart_str_append_printf(str, "%s  }\n", indent);
+                smart_str_free(&prop_str);
+        }
+
+        /* Non static methods */
+        count = zend_hash_num_elements(&ce->function_table) - count_static_funcs;
+        if (count > 0) {
+                zend_function *mptr;
+                smart_str method_str = {0};
+
+                count = 0;
+                ZEND_HASH_MAP_FOREACH_PTR(&ce->function_table, mptr) {
+                        if ((mptr->common.fn_flags & ZEND_ACC_STATIC) == 0
+                                && ((mptr->common.fn_flags & ZEND_ACC_PRIVATE) == 0 || mptr->common.scope == ce))
+                        {
+                                zend_function *closure;
+                                /* see if this is a closure */
+                                if (obj && is_closure_invoke(ce, mptr->common.function_name)
+                                        && (closure = zend_get_closure_invoke_method(Z_OBJ_P(obj))) != NULL)
+                                {
+                                        mptr = closure;
+                                } else {
+                                        closure = NULL;
+                                }
+                                smart_str_appendc(&method_str, '\n');
+                                _function_string(&method_str, mptr, ce, ZSTR_VAL(sub_indent));
+                                count++;
+                                _free_function(closure);
+                        }
+                } ZEND_HASH_FOREACH_END();
+                smart_str_append_printf(str, "\n%s  - Methods [%d] {", indent, count);
+                smart_str_append_smart_str(str, &method_str);
+                if (!count) {
+                        smart_str_appendc(str, '\n');
+                }
+                smart_str_free(&method_str);
+        } else {
+                smart_str_append_printf(str, "\n%s  - Methods [0] {\n", indent);
+        }
+        smart_str_append_printf(str, "%s  }\n", indent);
+
+        smart_str_append_printf(str, "%s}\n", indent);
+        zend_string_release_ex(sub_indent, 0);
 }
 /* }}} */

+        }

 static void _enum_case_string(smart_str *str, const zend_string *name, zend_class_constant *c, const char *indent)
 {
-	if (Z_TYPE(c->value) == IS_CONSTANT_AST && zend_update_class_constant(c, name, c->ce) == FAILURE) {
-		return;
-	}
-
-	if (c->doc_comment) {
-		smart_str_append_printf(str, "%s%s\n", indent, ZSTR_VAL(c->doc_comment));
-	}
-	smart_str_append_printf(str, "%sCase %s", indent, ZSTR_VAL(name));
-	if (c->ce->enum_backing_type == IS_UNDEF) {
-		// No value
-		smart_str_appendc(str, '\n');
-	} else {
-		/* Has a value, which is the enum instance, get the value from that.
-		 * We know it must be either a string or integer so no need
-		 * for the IS_ARRAY or IS_OBJECT handling that _class_const_string()
-		 * requires. */
-		zval *enum_val = zend_enum_fetch_case_value(Z_OBJ(c->value));
-		zend_string *tmp_value_str;
-		zend_string *value_str = zval_get_tmp_string(enum_val, &tmp_value_str);
-		smart_str_append_printf(str, " = %s\n", ZSTR_VAL(value_str));

-	}
+        if (Z_TYPE(c->value) == IS_CONSTANT_AST && zend_update_class_constant(c, name, c->ce) == FAILURE) {
+                return;
+        }
+
+        if (c->doc_comment) {
+                smart_str_append_printf(str, "%s%s\n", indent, ZSTR_VAL(c->doc_comment));
+        }
+        smart_str_append_printf(str, "%sCase %s", indent, ZSTR_VAL(name));
+        if (c->ce->enum_backing_type == IS_UNDEF) {
+                // No value
+                smart_str_appendc(str, '\n');
+        } else {
+                /* Has a value, which is the enum instance, get the value from that.
+                 * We know it must be either a string or integer so no need
+                 * for the IS_ARRAY or IS_OBJECT handling that _class_const_string()
+                 * requires. */
+                zval *enum_val = zend_enum_fetch_case_value(Z_OBJ(c->value));
+                zend_string *tmp_value_str;
+                zend_string *value_str = zval_get_tmp_string(enum_val, &tmp_value_str);
+                smart_str_append_printf(str, " = %s\n", ZSTR_VAL(value_str));
+                zend_tmp_string_release(tmp_value_str);
+        }
 }

 static void format_default_value(smart_str *str, zval *value) {
-	if (smart_str_append_zval(str, value, SIZE_MAX) == SUCCESS) {
-		/* Nothing to do. */
-	} else if (Z_TYPE_P(value) == IS_ARRAY) {
-		zend_string *str_key;
-		zend_long num_key;
-		zval *zv;
-		bool is_list = zend_array_is_list(Z_ARRVAL_P(value));
-		bool first = true;
-		smart_str_appendc(str, '[');
-		ZEND_HASH_FOREACH_KEY_VAL(Z_ARRVAL_P(value), num_key, str_key, zv) {
-			if (!first) {
-				smart_str_appends(str, ", ");
-			}
-			first = false;
-
-			if (!is_list) {
-				if (str_key) {
-					smart_str_appendc(str, '\'');
-					smart_str_append_escaped(str, ZSTR_VAL(str_key), ZSTR_LEN(str_key));
-					smart_str_appendc(str, '\'');
-				} else {
-					smart_str_append_long(str, num_key);
-				}
-				smart_str_appends(str, " => ");
-			}
-			format_default_value(str, zv);
-		} ZEND_HASH_FOREACH_END();
-		smart_str_appendc(str, ']');
-	} else if (Z_TYPE_P(value) == IS_OBJECT) {
-		/* This branch is reached if the constant AST was already evaluated and
-		 * resulted in an object; enums are already handled in smart_str_append_zval()
-		 * (GH-15902) */
-		zend_object *obj = Z_OBJ_P(value);
-		zend_class_entry *class = obj->ce;
-		ZEND_ASSERT(!(class->ce_flags & ZEND_ACC_ENUM));
-		smart_str_appends(str, "object(");
-		smart_str_append(str, class->name);
-		smart_str_appendc(str, ')');
-	} else {
-		ZEND_ASSERT(Z_TYPE_P(value) == IS_CONSTANT_AST);
-		zend_string *ast_str = zend_ast_export("", Z_ASTVAL_P(value), "");
-		smart_str_append(str, ast_str);
-		zend_string_release(ast_str);
-	}
+        if (smart_str_append_zval(str, value, SIZE_MAX) == SUCCESS) {
+                /* Nothing to do. */
+        } else if (Z_TYPE_P(value) == IS_ARRAY) {

+                        first = false;
+
+                        if (!is_list) {
+                                if (str_key) {
+                                        smart_str_appendc(str, '\'');
+                                        smart_str_append_escaped(str, ZSTR_VAL(str_key), ZSTR_LEN(str_key));
+                                        smart_str_appendc(str, '\'');

+                                }
+                                smart_str_appends(str, " => ");
